title: geum triflorum
intro: Geum triflorum, also known as the Three-flowered Avens, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Geum triflorum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
